title: GoalSeekerVerdict
description: The evaluate gate's typed output: is the goal done, and if not what is the next dispatchable step? Kept small on purpose — the expensive evaluator emits only this, never a restatement of the preamble.

verdict.description: done = every change integrated AND every wall-gate green; blocked = no ready change can proceed without human input; not_done = work remains and is dispatchable.

summary.description: One paragraph: where the goal stands and why this verdict. Summary-level; cite change ids, not inlined detail.

next_instruction.description: Null when done. Otherwise one instruction (or an array for parallel disjoint dispatch). Each is directly dispatchable to a worker with no re-interpretation.

change_id.description: The ledger id to work next (e.g. 0.1, WM.0).

pipeline.description: The kitsoki pipeline to drive: bugfix | implementation | docs.

action.description: What the worker does — imperative, self-contained.

cmd.description: The deterministic check whose exit code is the gate.
